---
name: "✨ Feature request"
about: "Suggest a new idea or improvement"
title: "[✨ Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## 👋 What is this template for?

Use this form when you want to request a new feature or improve an existing one.
Simple language is welcome.

## 🤔 What problem are you facing?

What problem are you trying to solve?

## 👥 Who needs this and when?

Who needs this and in what scenario?

## 💡 Your idea / proposed solution

Describe the solution you want.

## 🔄 Other ideas considered (optional)

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## 🌍 Scope and impact

Who benefits and what areas of the repo are affected?

## ✅ Done looks like...

- [ ] Clear user-facing behavior is defined
- [ ] Scope is realistic for this repository
- [ ] Edge cases are considered

## 🚦 Priority

- [ ] 🔴 High
- [ ] 🟡 Medium
- [ ] 🟢 Low

## 📎 Extra details (optional)

Links, references, screenshots, or mockups.

## ✅ Final checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] I explained the problem and expected outcome clearly.
